name: codex
_comment: VERIFIED 2026-07-08 against Codex CLI 0.143.0 (macOS, API-key auth) via scripts/verify_harness.py — the woken agent read the briefing file and echoed the canary token. --skip-git-repo-check lets it run from any working directory; drop it if you point Codex at a real repo. Ships enabled:false by default.
command: You were woken by ZugaMind, a cognition sidecar. Read the file at {briefing_file} and act on what it asks.
